subcodes.first_line: That which is most conducive to the welfare of the servants is to commit all affairs unto God, glorified be His majesty, inasmuch as most men know not what shall profit them or harm them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه مصلحت عباد است تفویض امور است بحق جل جلاله چه که اکثری از ما یضر و ما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
